sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Celularity Announces Closing of Financing Transactions
feed.summary: Celularity Inc. announced the closing of financing transactions with Philip A. Barach, securing $10.00 million in gross proceeds with a potential for an additional $2.0 million. This financing, consisting of a senior secured term loan and convertible notes, aims to strengthen Celularity's financial position and support its focus on leveraging its placental-derived platform for healthy aging and performance optimization. The company plans to articulate its corporate strategy more fully in the new year to align scientific capabilities with long-term opportunities in longevity and age-related diseases.

feed.title: Chatham Lodging Trust Announces Sale of Hotel
feed.summary: Chatham Lodging Trust has announced the sale of its 27-year-old, 147-suite Homewood Suites by Hilton Billerica, Ma., for $17.4 million. An approximate $6 million renovation was planned for 2025 but was halted due to the sale. This transaction increases the total proceeds from six hotel sales since December 2024 to approximately $100 million.

feed.title: Cemtrex Completes Registered Direct Offering to Institutional Investor
feed.summary: Cemtrex (CETX) successfully completed a $2 million registered direct offering with an institutional investor on December 23, 2025, issuing approximately 800,000 shares and pre-funded warrants. The company plans to use the net proceeds for general corporate purposes, including working capital and potential acquisitions, aiming to strengthen its balance sheet and support growth initiatives. Despite the positive capital injection, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates CETX as Neutral due to poor financial performance, high leverage, and a bearish technical trend, though regaining Nasdaq compliance provides some support.

feed.title: Bausch Health Cos (NYSE:BHC) Trading Up 4.9% - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: Bausch Health Cos Inc. (NYSE:BHC) saw its shares increase by 4.9% during trading, closing at $7.3350. Analysts have issued varied ratings, with a consensus "Hold" and a price target of $8.67. Several hedge funds have recently adjusted their positions in the company, which operates in ophthalmology and diversified pharmaceutical brands.

feed.title: Investors Buy Large Volume of Call Options on Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX)
feed.summary: Investors recently bought a large volume of call options on Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX), totaling 99,688 options, a 624% increase from the average daily volume. This unusual activity comes amidst varied analyst ratings, with an average price target of $293.13 and some insider selling by the CFO and CEO. The company also recently increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Salesforce gives stock awards to 55 new employees from Regrello deal
feed.summary: Salesforce announced it has granted 222,453 restricted stock units (RSUs) to 55 new employees joining from the Regrello acquisition. These equity awards, made under its 2014 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan, will vest over four years to incentivize and retain the new personnel. This move aims to align the interests of the new employees with Salesforce's long-term success.

feed.title: Applied Materials Stock (AMAT) News and Forecasts for Dec. 23, 2025: Analyst Price Targets Rise on AI Memory Boom, China Risk Still Looms
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) is seeing increased analyst price targets due to optimism surrounding AI-linked wafer fab equipment, particularly in advanced memory and leading-edge foundry, with shares trading around $259. Despite bullish indicators from several analysts, concerns persist regarding the company's exposure to China and U.S. export controls, leading to a mixed outlook among investors. The stock's valuation is a point of contention, with some analysts maintaining "Hold" ratings or even suggesting a "Sell" due to perceived overvaluation, while others argue it remains undervalued compared to peers given its broad market positioning.

feed.title: AbbVie (ABBV) Stock News Today, Dec. 23, 2025: Beyond Botox Pipeline Push, Analyst Targets, and What to Watch Next
feed.summary: AbbVie (ABBV) stock traded slightly higher on December 23, 2025, driven by pipeline advancements in aesthetics and eye care, and ongoing discussions about U.S. drug-pricing policy. Key investor focuses include the "beyond Botox" neurotoxin R&D, comparative analysis with AstraZeneca highlighting the growth of Skyrizi and Rinvoq, and the progress of the ABBV-444 eye-care treatment. The article also covers analyst price targets, the strength of its core immunology products, and ongoing M&A activities influencing its long-term growth and dividend prospects.

feed.title: Kroger Plans $391M Kentucky Distribution Hub
feed.summary: Kroger is establishing a new $391 million distribution hub in Simpson County, Kentucky, expected to create 430 new jobs. This facility will feature automated technologies and will be Kroger's fifth manufacturing and distribution site in Kentucky. The project is eligible for significant state tax incentives.

feed.title: Cemtrex Signs Securities Purchase Agreement With Accredited Institutional Investor
feed.summary: Cemtrex (CETX) has executed a Securities Purchase Agreement with an accredited institutional investor for a registered direct offering. The company issued 330,000 shares of common stock and pre-funded warrants for 470,000 shares, generating $2,000,000 in gross proceeds. These funds are intended to enhance liquidity and support general corporate needs.

feed.title: Chubb Limited Appoints John Depeters as Executive Vice President, Head of Commercial Insurance and Specialty
feed.summary: Chubb Limited has appointed John DePeters as Executive Vice President, Head of Commercial Insurance and Specialty for Chubb Overseas General Insurance (COG). Mr. DePeters, who has over 13 years of insurance experience, will be based in London. This new role will see him leading the commercial and specialty insurance operations for COG.

feed.title: FIS agrees to pay $210M settlement
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) has agreed to a $210 million settlement in a lawsuit filed by investors regarding its 2019 acquisition of Worldpay. Shareholders alleged that FIS and its executives made misleading statements that artificially inflated the company's shares. This settlement follows FIS's subsequent decision to sell a majority stake in Worldpay, ultimately divesting the business for $11.7 billion and later $24.25 billion, after the initial $35 billion acquisition.

feed.title: Clearwater's new two-story Target could spark more retail development
feed.summary: A new two-story Target location is opening in the former Sears at Countryside Mall in Clearwater. This development is anticipated to revitalize the local retail market by attracting new tenants and testing the potential of a single anchor store to rejuvenate a mall. The move could reshape Clearwater's retail landscape.

feed.title: Synopsys, Inc. (SNPS) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay & Murray LLP announces a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Synopsys, Inc. (SNPS) for investors who suffered losses. The lawsuit alleges that Synopsys failed to disclose how its increased focus on AI customers was negatively impacting its Design IP business economics. Shareholders have until December 30, 2025, to join or lead the lawsuit.

feed.title: Philip Morris International Stock (NYSE: PM) Today: News, Analyst Forecasts, Dividend Outlook, and What’s Driving Shares on Dec. 23, 2025
feed.summary: Philip Morris International (NYSE: PM) stock is performing well on December 23, 2025, driven by a focus on its smoke-free growth, dividend schedule, and positive analyst price targets, with shares up 1.4% at $161.94. The company has reinforced its liquidity with new and extended credit facilities and is transitioning to a new segment reporting structure in 2026, emphasizing the increasing importance of smoke-free products to its revenue and profit. Analyst forecasts remain constructive with average price targets in the $180s, despite some institutional trimming of positions.

feed.title: Charles Schwab to add to 'Trump Accounts' for employees
feed.summary: Charles Schwab announced it will add to "Trump Accounts" for its employees, matching the U.S. government's $1,000 contribution to the children's savings program. The program was established under the One Big Beautiful Bill Act, signed into law by President Donald Trump. Other prominent figures and billionaires are also supporting these accounts.

feed.title: Can SOPA’s Undervaluation Turn into Opportunity?
feed.summary: Society Pass Incorporated (SOPA) is experiencing a 14.1% stock increase due to positive market sentiment driven by strategic mergers and acquisitions in Southeast Asia and beyond, alongside significant investments in AI technology. Market experts suggest a substantial undervaluation, particularly with its NusaTrip asset, leading Ascendiant to raise SOPA's price target to $22.50. Despite operational cost challenges, SOPA's financial strategy, including stock issuance and a low price-to-book ratio, positions it for potential growth in competitive digital ecosystems.

feed.title: Why AOI Stock Is Rising?
feed.summary: Applied Optoelectronics Inc. (NASDAQ: AAOI) stock is rising due to increased market confidence following a major hyperscale customer order for 800G transceivers, expected to add $4M-$8M to Q4 earnings. Analysts have raised price targets, and the company plans to increase capacity to meet demand, indicating potential for sustained growth in AI-driven data solutions. Despite a net loss in Q3 2025, the firm's financial ratios suggest solvency and strategic investments in growth.

feed.title: Fortune 50 company lays off nearly 100 at Memphis facility
feed.summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Co. (ADM), a Fortune 50 company, plans to lay off 95 workers at its Memphis facility in 2026. The Chicago-based company had over $80 million in revenue in 2024. ADM recently filed a notice with Tennessee officials regarding the impending layoffs.

feed.title: Home Depot Stock (NYSE: HD) on Dec. 23, 2025: Price Near $344 as Analysts Debate the 2026 “Recovery” Setup
feed.summary: Home Depot's stock (NYSE: HD) traded near $344 on December 23, 2025, as investors considered new analyst targets and the retailer's 2026 outlook amidst an interest-rate-sensitive housing market. Analysts are divided on whether the company's conservative 2026 forecast will be met or if an improving housing market could lead to a more optimistic "recovery case." The stock's performance is heavily tied to the timing of a rebound in housing activity and larger home improvement projects.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs (GS) Stock Today, Dec. 23, 2025: Latest News, Analyst Forecasts, and What Could Drive Shares in 2026
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs (GS) is closing out 2025 near its annual high, trading around $905 on December 23, driven by M&A momentum, resilient capital markets, and asset/wealth management growth. Investors are balancing optimism for 2026 rate cuts with concerns about "hot valuations" and AI-driven volatility. Key developments include strategic expansion in Japan, the acquisition of Innovator Capital Management, and strengthening its tech advisory, while analyst price targets mostly sit below the current share price despite strong earnings forecasts.

feed.title: PepsiCo Stock (PEP) Slides on Dec. 23, 2025 as Elliott-Backed Cost Cuts, 2026 Outlook and Dividend Growth Take Center Stage
feed.summary: PepsiCo (PEP) stock dropped on December 23, 2025, as investors analyzed the company's new North America turnaround strategy, which focuses on "everyday value," portfolio simplification, and productivity, alongside near-term execution risks. The strategy, influenced by activist investor Elliott Investment Management, includes a preliminary 2026 financial outlook with targets for organic growth, EPS expansion, and free cash flow. Despite the stock slide, PepsiCo's consistent dividend increases continue to make it attractive to income investors.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Allen Behr Sells 5,950 Shares of Nucor Corp (NUE)
feed.summary: Allen Behr, Executive Vice President of a Nucor Corp subsidiary, sold 5,950 shares of Nucor Corp (NUE) on December 19, 2025, bringing his total ownership to 67,711.16 shares. This sale is part of a pattern where insiders have sold 13 times and made no purchases over the past year. Nucor Corp is currently deemed fairly valued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.04, trading at $157.89 per share.

feed.title: |ABM Industries: This Drop Is Unjustified (NYSE:ABM)
feed.summary: |ABM Industries is considered a buy due to strong organic and acquisition-driven growth, despite recent stock underperformance. Key segments like Technical Solutions and Aviation are driving revenue, while management implements cost-cutting measures and focuses on customer retention. The company's attractive valuation based on cash flow and EV/EBITDA multiples, alongside positive 2026 guidance, suggests potential for future upside.

feed.title: Contineum prices $110M IPO to advance LPA1R antagonists
feed.summary: Contineum Therapeutics Inc. has priced its IPO, raising $110 million by selling 6.9 million shares at $16 each to advance its LPA1R antagonist program. Shares of the San Diego-based company began trading on Nasdaq under the ticker CTNM on April 5, ending the day down 3.8% at $15.40. This marks one of ten biopharma IPOs seen so far in 2024.

feed.title: The Generation Essentials Group - First The Generation Essentials Group-Sponsored SPAC Announces Successful Closing of $150 million IPO
feed.summary: The Generation Essentials Group announced the successful closing of a $150 million Initial Public Offering (IPO) for its first sponsored Special Purpose Acquisition Company (SPAC). This marks a significant milestone for the group, with further details available via a provided press release link.

feed.title: Cemtrex Shares Drop: Opportunity or Risk?
feed.summary: Cemtrex Inc. (CETX) shares have plummeted by over 20% after news of a $2M equity offering and challenging market conditions. Despite troubling financial indicators like negative EBIT margins and liquidity issues, the company holds significant assets, suggesting potential for recovery if strategic operational efficiencies are implemented. The article explores whether this downturn presents a calculated opportunity for investors or signifies a continuing risk.

feed.title: Annovis Sets Investor Webinar as Neurodegeneration Pipeline Reaches Inflection
feed.summary: Annovis Bio, Inc. (NYSE: ANVS) announced it will host an investor webinar on Wednesday, January 28, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern, to provide a corporate update as its neurodegeneration pipeline enters a "milestone-rich period." The webinar will feature President and CEO Maria Maccecchini discussing company progress, clinical study updates, and strategic direction, followed by a live Q&A session. The company focuses on developing therapies for Alzheimer's and Parkinson's diseases, aiming to slow or halt neurodegeneration.

feed.title: AeroVironment signs lease for new Utah facility with 10-year term
feed.summary: AeroVironment Inc. (NASDAQ:AVAV) has signed a 10-year lease for a new 130,733-square-foot facility in West Valley City, Utah, to support its significant growth, with revenue up nearly 80% over the past year. The lease outlines incremental monthly rent increases and options for two five-year extensions. This expansion complements recent strategic developments, including the delivery of advanced weapon systems to the U.S. Army and positive analyst ratings.

feed.title: Key facts: PG&E substation fire causes outage for 130,000; bill credits issued
feed.summary: A fire at a PG&E substation led to a power outage affecting 130,000 San Francisco residents, disrupting traffic and Waymo robotaxis. PG&E Corp. (PCG) will provide automatic bill credits of $200 for residential and $2,500 for business customers impacted by the outage.

feed.title: Key facts: Palo Alto Networks to acquire CyberArk for $25 billion; partners with Google Cloud
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks is set to acquire CyberArk for $25 billion, a significant move in the cybersecurity sector. Additionally, Palo Alto Networks and Google Cloud have enhanced their partnership, focusing on AI security by integrating Google Cloud's AI tools with Palo Alto's Prisma AIRS for secure multicloud solutions.

feed.title: Ford Racing partners with new O'Reilly Auto Parts Series team
feed.summary: Ford Racing and Roush Yates Engines have partnered with Hettinger Racing for the 2026 O'Reilly Auto Parts Series season, where the new team will field the No. 5 Ford Mustang. Ford Racing will provide technical support and Roush Yates Engines will supply power, aiming for national competition visibility through The CW's coverage. This collaboration positions Hettinger Racing to quickly compete, especially as other major Ford teams transition to Chevrolet.

feed.title: Moody’s upgraded to ’A-’ by S&P on strong market position
feed.summary: S&P Global Ratings has upgraded Moody’s Corporation’s credit rating to ’A-’ from ’BBB+’ with a stable outlook, citing the company's strong market position, growth, and market leadership. The upgrade reflects Moody's significant expansion, with revenues nearing $8 billion and its Analytics segment now contributing 47% of total revenues. S&P highlighted Moody's solid competitive position, strong pricing power, and diversification provided by the Analytics segment, expecting sustained operating performance and disciplined financial policy.

feed.title: Gov. Beshear: Kroger To Establish New $391 Million Distribution Center in Franklin and Create 430 New Full-Time Jobs
authors: Office of Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear
feed.summary: Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear announced that Kroger, the nation's largest traditional grocer, plans to establish a new $391 million distribution center in Simpson County, Kentucky. This project is expected to create 430 new full-time jobs, significantly boosting the local economy and further solidifying Kroger's presence in the state. The new facility will serve as a full-line distribution center with advanced automation, building on other recent economic successes in Kentucky.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC, guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co., is issuing $748,000 Uncapped Dual Directional Buffered Return Enhanced Notes linked to the lesser performing of the Dow Jones Industrial Average and the Nasdaq-100 Index, due December 22, 2028. These structured investments are designed for investors seeking an uncapped return on appreciation or a capped return on depreciation of the underlying indices, with a potential loss of up to 85.00% of their principal amount at maturity. The notes priced on December 19, 2025, and are expected to settle around December 24, 2025, with associated investment risks detailed in the provided documents.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has issued $679,000 in Uncapped Digital Barrier Notes, linked to the Dow Jones Industrial Average, Russell 2000 Index, and S&P 500 Index, due December 22, 2028. These notes are fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. The notes are designed for investors seeking uncapped exposure to the appreciation of the least performing index, subject to a contingent minimum return of 31.25%, but investors risk losing some or all of their principal.

feed.title: FirstEnergy upgraded to ’BBB+’ by S&P on improved governance
feed.summary: S&P Global Ratings has upgraded FirstEnergy Corp. to 'BBB+' from 'BBB' with a stable outlook, citing significant improvements in governance and risk management following the H.B. 6 bribery scandal. The company has fulfilled its reform obligations with the Department of Justice and management is now focused on managing regulatory risk, including constructive outcomes from recent rate cases. S&P expects FirstEnergy to maintain its consolidated funds from operations (FFO) to debt ratio at 12%-14%.

feed.title: FedEx Freight sees revenue dip as June 2026 spinoff nears
feed.summary: FedEx Freight is experiencing a revenue dip as its June 2026 spinoff date approaches. FedEx has already invested hundreds of millions of dollars into the separation process, with additional costs anticipated before the freight division becomes an independent company. This move is part of FedEx's broader strategy, which includes significant capital expenditure and a new C-suite lineup for the spin-out.

feed.title: Eversource Nears Finish Line for Undersea Cable Project
feed.summary: Eversource is nearing completion of a $310 million project to install two new undersea electric cables between Martha's Vineyard and Falmouth, aiming to meet the Island's growing energy demands. One cable has been laid, with the second expected soon, and the project is anticipated to be connected to the grid in the first quarter of 2026. This initiative will eliminate the need for diesel generators and address rising electricity consumption on the Vineyard.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Stock (XOM) News Today: Shares Trade Near $120 as Analysts Weigh Exxon’s 2030 Plan, Buybacks, and 2026 Oil Forecasts
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil (XOM) shares are trading near $120 as investors evaluate its updated long-term corporate plan, which includes higher production targets, significant shareholder returns through buybacks and dividends, and a focus on cost savings. Analysts are balancing these ambitious goals against varying 2026 oil market forecasts, ranging from potential surpluses to geopolitical supply risks. Exxon's strategy also incorporates disciplined low-carbon investments, aiming for returns while navigating the evolving energy landscape.

feed.title: Seagate Technology (STX) Stock News Today: Nasdaq-100 Inclusion, Dividend Date, and Analyst Forecasts in Focus (23 December 2025)
feed.summary: Seagate Technology (STX) is experiencing a pullback on December 23, 2025, after a strong year, yet remains a key "AI infrastructure" play. The stock is influenced by its recent inclusion in the Nasdaq-100, an upcoming dividend date, and positive analyst forecast revisions. While a Trefis note questions STX's resilience to a pullback given its drastic surge, the company's AI-storage narrative, strong Q1 FY2026 results, and HAMR technology momentum continue to drive a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts.

feed.title: Cisco Systems (CSCO) Stock on Dec. 23, 2025: AI Tailwinds, Analyst Targets, Dividend Outlook, and a Critical Zero‑Day in Focus
feed.summary: Cisco Systems (CSCO) stock is trading near $78 on December 23, 2025, buoyed by AI-driven networking momentum and consistent shareholder returns, despite a recent cybersecurity vulnerability. Analysts generally have a consensus price target in the mid-$80s, reflecting optimism about AI infrastructure buildouts. However, the company is also facing scrutiny over a critical zero-day vulnerability in its AsyncOS, which could impact its security franchise narrative.

feed.title: Caterpillar (CAT) Stock News Today: December 23, 2025 Update, Analyst Forecasts, and What Could Move Shares Next
feed.summary: Caterpillar (NYSE: CAT) is trading higher on December 23, 2025, driven by strong data-center power demand and a supportive broader market. The stock has shown volatility recently but remains a "Moderate Buy" among analysts, with a consensus price target of $616. Upcoming catalysts include Q4 earnings, tariff trajectory, and the RPMGlobal acquisition closing.

feed.title: Alaska Air Group Inc.: Navigating Financial Turbulence
feed.summary: Alaska Air Group Inc. (ALK) is experiencing financial turbulence, with its stock trading down by -4.19% due to operational challenges and alleged securities law violations. The company has revised its Q4 earnings projection downward, citing IT outages and elevated fuel costs. ALK is working to regain stability through strategic moves focused on regaining oversight and rebuilding IT architecture, alongside maintaining prudent cost controls and management efficiency.

feed.title: WSP Global (TSE:WSP) Stock Price Expected to Rise, Raymond James Financial Analyst Says
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has increased its price target for WSP Global (TSE:WSP) from C$310.00 to C$340.00, maintaining a "strong-buy" rating and indicating a potential upside of 35.13%. Several other analysts have also raised their price objectives, resulting in a consensus "Buy" rating and an average target price of C$330.42 for WSP Global. The company recently reported quarterly EPS of C$2.82 on revenues of C$4.53 billion and has a market cap of C$32.86 billion.

feed.title: Moderna: Why I Am Selling The 'Relief Rally' (NASDAQ:MRNA)
feed.summary: Moderna's stock has seen a 23% rally, but the author maintains a 'Sell' rating due to deteriorating fundamentals, arguing the rally is driven by liquidity improvements and cost discipline rather than core business growth. The discontinuation of the CMV program removes a key pipeline asset, increasing reliance on declining COVID and underperforming RSV franchises. The author suggests Moderna’s strategy prioritizes survival through cost cuts, potentially sacrificing long-term pipeline value and growth visibility.

feed.title: Moderna Stock (MRNA) Drops on Dec. 23, 2025: Latest News, Analyst Forecasts, and What Investors Are Watching Next
feed.summary: Moderna (MRNA) shares dropped by roughly 6% on December 23, 2025, retracting after a significant multi-day rally. This decline is attributed more to profit-taking and volatility after a rapid ascent rather than a specific new announcement. Despite the drop, investors are weighing several key developments including new funding for its H5 vaccine, European regulatory progress for its next-gen COVID shot, and a drug delivery deal, as the company transitions from a "pandemic windfall machine" to a "multi-product biotech" with a focus on cost reduction and pipeline development.

feed.title: Former Medtronic EVP Greg Smith moves to Walgreens
feed.summary: Greg Smith, formerly Medtronic's EVP of Enterprise Operations, has taken on the role of chief supply chain officer at Walgreens. His move follows his retirement from Medtronic in December 2025, where he was a top-paid executive. Smith brings extensive retail and supply chain experience from previous roles at Walmart, Goodyear, and ConAgra Foods.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Group Raises Price Target for Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) | LYV Stock News
feed.summary: Evercore ISI Group analyst Ashton Welles has raised the price target for Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) from $168 to $188, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating, indicating continued confidence in the company. This adjustment represents an 11.90% increase in the target price. The article also provides historical analyst ratings and an overview of Live Nation's market position and financial forecasts.

feed.title: American Eagle, JCPenney, Netflix: The brands that survived, thrived and took a dive in 2025
feed.summary: This article reviews the defining brand moments of 2025, highlighting companies that navigated cultural conversations and economic shifts with varying degrees of success. It examines how brands like American Eagle, Levi's, and Netflix thrived through controversial campaigns, inclusivity efforts, or strategic growth, while others such as Target, E.l.f. Beauty, and Cracker Barrel faced backlash or operational challenges, reflecting a turbulent year for brand marketing.
